name: PurelyHR
description: With customizable templates, scheduling, goal-setting, and more, Performance is your all-in-one performance management solution. Learn more about PurelyHR

reviews.review_description: Whenever I'm not sure how to do something, there's a great library of tutorial videos. A couple of times I needed help and their customer support was great! They answered me quickly and gave me what I needed. My employees like the modern look and it's very easy to navigate, and our management team likes the reporting capabilities.
reviews.review_pros: The ease of use, my employees love it and so do I.
reviews.review_cons: I can't think of anything that I don't like about it.

reviews.review_description: We have had PHR for a few years now with no issues. I have had a really good experience and when I needed personalized support, it was there with a phone call.
reviews.review_pros: I really like the ease of use and functions and PHR allows me to manage my team effectively. I really like the audit function that keeps track of time off for each employee. I also like how it keeps everything I need in one place.
reviews.review_cons: We are a non-profit and operate on a very limited budget. The cost to have all functions would be my least favorite part of PHR.

reviews.review_title: More webinars and a module manual
reviews.review_description: Overall, if I knew of a resource I could reference anytime I need to for instructions, it would be so helpful. I appreciate the ability to schedule a call, but sometimes I need to generate information quickly and don't have the time to wait for a call. I wish there were more webinars on specific topics, rather than fewer that are so packed with information it's tough to follow.
reviews.review_pros: I like that there is a variety of reports to access. I also like how easy it is for staff to use the time clock module.
reviews.review_cons: There is a learning curve since there is no hard copy to reference for instructions. I also don't like that the modules don't communicate with one another. I have to pull reports out to Excel and manipulate the data there. It can be time-consuming.

reviews.review_title: Goodbye Spreadsheets: A Seamless Solution for Time-Off Tracking
reviews.review_description: My overall experience with PurelyHR has been excellent. It has successfully moved our company away from messy spreadsheets and "lost" email requests into a centralized, transparent system. It strikes a perfect balance between being robust enough for HR administrators to set specific policies and being simple enough for employees to use with zero training. It’s a reliable, "set-it-and-forget-it" solution that has significantly improved our office's transparency and work-life balance.
reviews.review_pros: The Time-Off module is straightforward and eliminates the headache of manual tracking. Before switching to PurelyHR, we always used a spreadsheet. What stands out most is the shared leave calendar, which gives the entire team instant visibility into who is away, making project planning much smoother. We don’t use the accruals because we apply a bucket at the beginning of the year, but the "Estimated Balance" tool makes it really easy to monitor all employee’s usage before the end of the year. The ability to approve requests directly from an email notification is a huge time-saver for busy managers.
reviews.review_cons: While the system is powerful, the initial setup for complex, non-traditional shift schedules can take a bit of fine-tuning to get exactly right. Additionally, the mobile experience is limited compared to the desktop version. It would be great to see more of the advanced reporting features fully optimized for the mobile app interface.

reviews.review_description: We appreciate how user friendly the modules are. We love the product and the staff are very helpful when we have questions!
reviews.review_pros: All of my supervisors love the ease of employee attendance tracking and the time clock. Leave is easy for users to submit and supervisors to approve. The time clock works perfectly! The price point is good as well for our small non-profit.
reviews.review_cons: I can’t say that there’s anything that I would change. Of course, things can always be cheaper but this product is very reasonable compared to other solutions.

reviews.review_title: User Friendly, Customizable w/Great Reporting Features
reviews.review_description: Overall PurelyHR meets our needs perfectly and exceeded our expectations when the team began using the Time Off module. It beats tracking time off on an Excel spreadsheet, and the reporting is excellent.
reviews.review_pros: User friendly, highly customizable, easy tracking and approval, great reports, easy onboarding backed by a supportive and communicative staff.
reviews.review_cons: Initially setting up our time off balances was a little confusing, but customer care was always just a phone call or email away.

reviews.review_description: Overall it's been positive. We've been using them for about 3 years now and it's a very easy, simple system that works well for a small company.
reviews.review_pros: Easy to use, easy to make adjustments to PTO and timesheets, overall staff have found it to be quite intuitive and user friendly as well.
reviews.review_cons: For the most part, the system is very intuitive. With that said, when I run into things that are difficult, while I've been able to get through to support, it sometimes takes a little bit of time to get the problem resolved.

reviews.review_title: PurelyHR has been a trusted HR tool for over 10 years
reviews.review_description: A very intuitive HR tool that we have used for attendance for the past 10 years. It has many robust features and reporting.
reviews.review_pros: PurelyHR is extremely easy to set up and use. The support team is incredibly helpful and responsive to any questions.
reviews.review_cons: I have not really had a negative experience with any of its functionality. I can always count on its accuracy.

reviews.review_title: A Reliable and User-Friendly HR Tool
reviews.review_description: Very easy to use and setup isn't too difficult. Help Desk Support is also very accessible and friendly.
reviews.review_pros: Clean, simple interface and easy for both Administrators and Employees to use. I also like that you can add or remove modules to suit your business needs.
reviews.review_cons: It's currently only available in web form; an app would be much more effective and would render better for mobile users.

reviews.review_description: Overall, my experience with PurelyHR has been positive. The customer service team is incredibly responsive and thorough, but some of the modules seem clunky in general.
reviews.review_pros: I appreciate the helpful and thorough customer service from the PurelyHR team. They follow through on problems and offer many solutions.
reviews.review_cons: The performance module is a bit antiquated and clunky. There are not many options to personalize (tools, drop down options) the overall module outside of competencies.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: Friendly unlimited support with setup and issues makes it easy to implement. Pricing is competitive for the features.
reviews.review_cons: It's a little basic in some areas but I hope improvements will come over time. Some basic integrations would be useful with training providers, for example. An app version for staff on the road could be useful.

reviews.review_description: We’ve used it for over 10 years. Better than any we’ve tried for time off calculation
reviews.review_pros: Easy to use and great visibility with Google calendar. Keeps track of many records and events in one place
reviews.review_cons: Doesn’t work with all systems can be hard to utilize fully.

reviews.review_description: My overall experience using PurelyHR has been a good thing. It has simplified my work as the Executive Assistant and my work doing timecards and keeping track of banked time etc.
reviews.review_pros: I like PurelyHR because everyone can see who is off and when, it's an easy way to keep track of banked time accumulated and taken and it helps me do up my timecards.
reviews.review_cons: There are things that we need to be able to do that we can't do yet in PurelyHR such as putting a cap on lieu time as our staff can only accumulate a certain amount of hours.

reviews.review_description: Completely improved the way we manage employees PTO. What a time saver and paper saver! Probably reduced our time spent managing PTO by 90percent.
reviews.review_pros: The ease and convenience for both administration and staff. The record keeping aspect without a paper trail is probably one of my favorite features.
reviews.review_cons: Can't say that I have one currently. If there was one thing, and it might be operator error on my part, but I would adjust the choice to limit the number of employee request on a given day to specific categories such as 4 employees requesting a personal day without restricting a sick day request if it's over the limit for requests.

reviews.review_title: Great system, still needs technology updates.
reviews.review_description: I have been with the company for over 10 years and we have had Purely HR even prior to that, it is part of our company norm and our employees are very used to it! The one drawback (which is why I have my review at a 4 stars) is that there is no app yet for a phone, employees still need to a use a web browser to access.
reviews.review_pros: Responsive on support issues, Ability to meet our company policies and structures when it comes to time off. Easy to view and organize.
reviews.review_cons: No app for phone, MFA is not through text and doesn't remember when logged in, certain functions (alphabetical), not allowing numbers as part of names.

reviews.review_description: We have been using Purely HR for quite a few years and have had zero complaints from any of our employees. Easy for them and Easy for management!!
reviews.review_pros: The most thing we like about Purely HR is that it is extremely easy for our employees to request time off.
reviews.review_cons: I honestly don't know if there is a con. Other than requesting the next years time off sometimes gets a little confusing. But we are easily able to figure it out.

reviews.review_description: Amazing software. Excellent customer service and support. Representatives are very professional and are very helpful.
reviews.review_pros: Easy to use and very professional. I have used the software for almost 10 years, and it's friendly. Management-wise, it is very accurate.
reviews.review_cons: A scheduling feature could also be beneficial, providing agencies with an all-in-one product to maintain better records.

reviews.review_title: Good product for time off management
reviews.review_description: Overall Purely HR support has been quick to respond to all issues and easy to work with. The software is also reasonably priced.
reviews.review_pros: Ease of use for Manager and employee to submit and approve time off via most computer systems. Easy to manage from the IT side of things.
reviews.review_cons: Purely HR struggles with their performance review program as it doesn't allow different managers for reviews vs time off approvals

reviews.review_description: We've been using Purely HR for over 8 years now and have never needed support nor have we ever considered moving off of it.
reviews.review_pros: PurelyHR is a very easy and cost effective way to manage our time off. My favourite part is being able to reliably track everyone's time off and the ability to calculate what is owing once an employee departs.
reviews.review_cons: Nothing comes to mind. It's all very intuitive and easy for staff and managers to share and use. We love it.

reviews.review_title: Clean. Simple to use. Simple to teach. No hassle.
reviews.review_description: Great. My team has no issues managing the tool or setting it up for new years. As I mentioned in the above comments, easy, simple, and useful tool.
reviews.review_pros: Clean user interface. Simple to use & Simple to teach. No hassle with set up. No bug issues. The scheduled reports are good for keeping leaders up to date.
reviews.review_cons: Need an option for hourly employees for accrual. Other than that, the tool works great. No other enhancements needed.

reviews.review_description: Overall I enjoy the system and think it has helped streamline our processes with Time Off requests. For a small firm this works perfectly.
reviews.review_pros: Support has been great and overall, the system is fairly intuitive. Onboarding new employees is fast and easy.
reviews.review_cons: There are some learning curves with the system, and there is a limitation for hourly employees with the Time Clock and Time Off model that did not work for our firm.

reviews.review_description: Overall, my experience is great. The Time-Off module is easy to use and covers our time-off tracking needs.
reviews.review_pros: PurelyHR has excellent technical support, which is responsive and can always follow through the issues.
reviews.review_cons: Not in general, but there is one case that requested vacation days were not deducted from the balance, it ended up with manual adjustment

reviews.review_description: My overall experience with PurelyHR was positive. It was easy to use, kept things organized, and made managing time-off easy.
reviews.review_pros: What I liked most about PurelyHR was how easy it was to use. The interface was simple, the time-off tracking worked really well. It felt like a great fit for a small team without being overly complicated.
reviews.review_cons: What I liked least about PurelyHR was that some of the features felt a bit basic, and I sometimes wished there were more customization options.

reviews.review_title: A great tool for a globally managed compnay.
reviews.review_description: A great tool for a global company and very easy to use for employees based in various regions of the world.
reviews.review_pros: Since, we are a global company, it was very difficult to manage staff leave and their line managers to approve based on different territory. PurelyHR made it very easy for us to consolidate and get various leave approvals easy.
reviews.review_cons: I think there's no way for PurelyHR to send a calender invite or something for MS outlook for their line managers to know their off schedule. For now its done manaully.

reviews.review_description: Has mentioned before we have been using PurelyHR for 10+ year and we are quite satisfied we would recommend for time-off.
reviews.review_pros: Simplicity and customization are made quite easy for administrator and employee's onboarding. We currently only use the time tracking portion of PurelyHR but we have been using for more than 10 years with great satisfaction. The cost has been quite positive as a not for profit.
reviews.review_cons: As far as time-off module goes, I think there's many reporting options and sometimes its hard to find on the first go the exact report type you need but there are some many options that what you are looking for does exist.
